resume.RawMarkdown:
Scott Galloway
AI Development Consultant / Systems Architect
Email: scott.galloway@gmail.com
Phone: 07498 479614 (email preferred)
Blog: https://www.mostlylucid.net
GitHub: https://github.com/scottgal
### Executive Summary
AI Development Consultant with 20+ years of production engineering experience, specialising in cost-efficient, auditable AI systems for enterprise environments. Expert in designing LLM-augmented systems that scale economically, using Reduced RAG, signal-driven pipelines, and deterministic orchestration rather than token-heavy “agent theatre”.
Proven track record modernising legacy platforms, architecting cloud-native systems, and delivering AI capabilities that pass security, compliance, and budget scrutiny. Author of 200+ technical articles, including 66+ on AI architecture, widely read for practical, production-focused guidance.
Particularly strong at:
turning vague “AI ideas” into shippable systems
reducing AI spend while improving reliability
separating signal, evidence, memory, and synthesis
### Core Expertise
AI Systems & Applied ML
LLM system architecture: RAG, Reduced RAG, GraphRAG, multi-stage synthesis
Cost-aware orchestration: bounded context, selective escalation, hybrid pipelines
Local & hybrid inference: ONNX Runtime, Ollama, CPU/GPU routing
Vector search & retrieval: pgvector, Qdrant, OpenSearch
NLP: embeddings, semantic search, NER, summarisation
Multi-modal pipelines: document, image, audio, and video summarisation
Evaluation & guardrails: deterministic scoring, provenance, auditability
Platform & Backend Engineering
.NET (Framework → .NET 9), ASP.NET Core, C#
Event-driven and distributed systems
REST, gRPC, SignalR
Domain-Driven Design, pragmatic microservices
Cloud, Infrastructure & Ops
Azure (Functions, App Services, AKS)
Docker & Kubernetes
CI/CD (GitHub Actions, Azure DevOps, GitLab)
Infrastructure-as-Code (Bicep)
Observability: Application Insights, custom telemetry, K6 load testing
Frontend & UX (supporting role)
HTMX, Alpine.js, Blazor, React, Vue
Tailwind CSS
System-driven UI patterns for operational tools
Writing & Thought Leadership
200+ technical articles
66+ AI-focused deep dives on architecture, RAG, OCR, ONNX, and system design
Blog: https://www.mostlylucid.net (practical examples, demo repos, benchmarks)
### Professional Experience
Mostlylucid Ltd — Owner / Principal AI Development Consultant
Jan 2012 – Present | Remote
Founded and operate an independent consultancy delivering AI-enabled systems and platform modernisation for startups and enterprise clients. Frequently operate at CTO / Principal Architect level, despite contract titles.
AI & LLM Systems
Designed and built DiSE (Directed Synthetic Evolution) — an open-source framework for self-optimising, multi-LLM workflows with automated testing, RAG-backed reuse, and platform-aware deployment (edge → cloud).
Architected multi-agent systems (classifier, planner, generator, evaluator) using local LLMs and external tools, with metric-driven evolution and executable ground-truth nodes.
Built custom RAG pipelines for enterprise semantic search, replacing naive “stuff the context window” approaches and reducing inference costs by orders of magnitude.
Systems Architecture & Modernisation
Led large-scale modernisation projects across fintech, healthcare, ecommerce, and public sector.
Migrated legacy monoliths to cloud-native architectures, achieving:
~50% infrastructure cost reduction
~80% faster deployment cycles
Designed AI-augmented recommendation and discovery systems using embeddings, vector search, and structured evidence pipelines.
### Mentorship & Education
Founded and ran a developer bootcamp; authored curriculum and trained 200+ engineers, achieving 90%+ industry placement.
ZenChef Ltd — Lead Contract Developer
Oct 2024 – Present | Remote
Migrated distributed legacy platform to .NET 8, improving reliability while reducing Azure costs.
Implemented deep performance optimisation using telemetry and load testing.
Provided high-signal technical leadership on a complex, event-driven microservices estate.
Very Jane Ltd — Senior Backend Developer
Apr 2024 – Aug 2024 | Remote
Built scalable ecommerce backend modules with Stripe Connect and Hyperwallet.
Bootstrapped new platform using .NET Core and PostgreSQL.
Designed robust data validation and migration pipelines for customer-supplied datasets.
Seamcor Ltd — Head of Engineering (Contract)
Dec 2022 – Apr 2024 | Remote
Led re-architecture of enterprise production management platform (10+ engineers).
Introduced Docker Compose orchestration and OpenSearch for analytics.
Designed hybrid deployment strategy (Azure + on-prem) to reduce customer costs.
GBG Plc (Loqate) — Lead Engineer
Aug 2022 – Nov 2022 | Remote
Worked on globally distributed address-lookup platform.
Optimised Elasticsearch/Kubernetes deployments for sub-second latency at scale.
Built K6-based performance testing infrastructure, cutting feedback cycles by ~80%.
Earlier Roles (Selected)
WCOM AB — Lead Developer (real-time collaboration, Blazor, SignalR)
H3Space Ltd — Lead Engineer (Unity SaaS backend, Azure)
Huozhi Ltd — Technical Consultant / Dev Lead (fintech modernisation)
Interactive Reporting Ltd — Lead Developer (BI/reporting engines)
Dell — Development Lead (internal automation platforms)
Microsoft Corp. — Program Manager II (ASP.NET, security platforms)
Microsoft Ltd. — Application Development Consultant II
StormID — Lead Developer
### Education
BSc (Hons) Psychology
University of Stirling, Scotland
